Arceuus Spellbook Rework
The Dark Magic of Xeric — 2018 Design Document
⚠ Historical Document — Written in 2018. The Arceuus spellbook was actively being discussed for a major rework at the time this was written. This is an archived design document from that period, kept here as a bonus piece of my design history. Some suggestions may have since been implemented, changed, or superseded by what Jagex eventually shipped.
